# How To Generate Leads With Cold Email in 2026 (FULL COURSE)

**Channel:** Matt Lucero
**URL:** https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BakY-82NYVQ
**Date:** 2026-04-12
**Content source:** auto-generated transcript

## Summary

This comprehensive cold email course covers the complete system for generating B2B leads at scale, from infrastructure setup to booking sales meetings. Matt Lucero shares proven methods used to send thousands of daily cold emails without landing in spam, based on 10+ million emails sent and 4,000+ meetings booked. The training breaks down four critical pillars: email infrastructure, targeting/data, scripting, and appointment setting.

## Key Points & Strategies

- **Four Pillars Framework**: Infrastructure → Targeting/Data → Scripting → Appointment Setting (missing any one breaks the entire system)
- **Volume Principle**: More cold emails = more meetings booked; success comes from getting in front of enough prospects
- **Human-Like Activity**: All automation should mimic natural human sending patterns to avoid spam filters
- **Horizontal Scaling**: Send fewer emails per inbox but use multiple inboxes/domains instead of blasting 1,000 from one account
- **IP Reputation Management**: Use providers (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365) that manage IP reputation for you rather than self-hosted servers
- **Avoid Self-Hosted Servers**: VPS and custom email servers are risky due to IP blacklist exposure; use managed providers instead
- **Domain & Account Setup**: Multiple domains with multiple email accounts within them spreads sending load and maintains deliverability

## Workflows & Tools Discussed

- **Email Providers**: Google Workspace, Microsoft 365/Outlook 365 (recommended over self-hosted solutions)
- **Infrastructure Approaches to Avoid**: Amazon servers, SendGrid, ConvertKit, Mailchimp (not designed for cold outreach), VPS solutions
- **Mention of Invo Marketing**: Matt's agency that implements these systems for clients
- **Automation Tools**: Referenced but not fully detailed in this transcript section (implied to be paired with infrastructure)

## Use Cases Covered

- B2B lead generation across multiple industries
- Case Study Results:
  - 62 meetings in 60 days
  - 10 meetings + 1 closed deal in 10 days
  - 100+ sales-qualified meetings booked in one month
- Enterprise-level scaling: thousands of daily emails without spam folder placement

## Quotes Worth Noting

> "The number one reason why most businesses are unable to grow is simply because they do not have a steady stream of prospects that are ready to buy their services."

> "The more cold emails you send, the more meetings you will book. The principle is true. The more eyeballs you get in front of, the higher chance you're going to get someone who's interested in your service."

> "Make sure everything you're doing is as human as possible... Even though we're going to be employing automation, the goal is to look human so that we don't land in the spam folder."
